apiKey.label: Supermemory API Key
apiKey.help: Your API key from app.supermemory.ai (or use ${SUPERMEMORY_OPENCLAW_API_KEY})

containerTag.label: Container Tag
containerTag.help: Memory namespace. Default: openclaw_{hostname}. All channels share this.

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Inject relevant memories + user profile before every AI turn

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically store important information from conversations

maxRecallResults.label: Max Recall Results
maxRecallResults.help: Maximum memories injected into context per turn

profileFrequency.label: Profile Injection Frequency
profileFrequency.help: Inject full profile (static + dynamic) every N turns. Search results are injected every turn.

captureMode.label: Capture Mode
captureMode.help: 'all' (default) = filter out short texts and injected context, 'everything' = capture all messages

entityContext.label: Entity Context
entityContext.help: Instructions for server-side atomic fact extraction. Default prompt decomposes conversations into individual facts with categories and confidence levels. Set empty to disable extraction (cheaper but lower quality). ⚠️ Non-empty = single-add API path (~10 calls/session vs 1 batch call).

debug.label: Debug Logging
debug.help: Enable verbose debug logs for API calls and responses

enableCustomContainerTags.label: Enable Custom Container Tags
enableCustomContainerTags.help: Enable AI-driven routing to custom containers

customContainers.label: Custom Containers
customContainers.help: Define custom containers with tags and descriptions for AI routing

customContainerInstructions.label: Container Instructions
customContainerInstructions.help: Instructions for AI on how to route memories to custom containers

categoryRouting.label: Category Routing
categoryRouting.help: Route memories to category-specific containers (preferences, facts, decisions, etc.). ⚠️ Multiplies search API calls by 6x. Auto-disabled when Custom Containers are defined.

filterPrompt.label: Filter Prompt (Org-Wide)
filterPrompt.placeholder: Custom instructions for org-wide content filtering...
filterPrompt.help: Org-wide LLM prompt controlling what gets extracted from ALL ingested content. Different from Entity Context (per-container). Leave blank for Supermemory defaults. Synced to Supermemory on plugin load.

shouldLLMFilter.label: Enable LLM Filtering
shouldLLMFilter.help: Enable server-side LLM filtering during ingestion. Must be enabled for Filter Prompt to take effect. Auto-enabled when Filter Prompt is set. Disable to save server tokens (raw indexing only).

profileCacheTtlMs.label: Profile Cache TTL (ms)
profileCacheTtlMs.help: How long to cache the SM user profile before re-fetching (milliseconds). Default: 60000 (60s). Lower = fresher profile but more API calls.

postCompactThreshold.label: PostCompact Similarity Threshold
postCompactThreshold.help: Minimum similarity for SM memories re-injected after compaction. Higher = fewer but more relevant results. Range: 0.0-1.0. Default: 0.6.

v4FetchTimeoutMs.label: V4 API Timeout (ms)
v4FetchTimeoutMs.help: Timeout for SM v4 direct memory creation API calls (milliseconds). Default: 10000 (10s). Increase on slow networks.
